Uses of Package
org.apache.paimon.crosspartition

  • Packages that use org.apache.paimon.crosspartition 
    Package Description
    org.apache.paimon.crosspartition  
    org.apache.paimon.flink.sink.index  
  • Classes in org.apache.paimon.crosspartition used by org.apache.paimon.crosspartition 
    Class and Description
    BucketAssigner
    Bucket Assigner to assign bucket in a partition.
    ExistingProcessor
    Processor to process existing key.
    ExistingProcessor.SortOrder
    Input Order for sorting.
  • Classes in org.apache.paimon.crosspartition used by org.apache.paimon.flink.sink.index 
    Class and Description
    GlobalIndexAssigner
    Assign UPDATE_BEFORE and bucket for the input record, output record with bucket.
    IndexBootstrap
    Bootstrap key index from Paimon table.
